compositional_arguments.name: order_vs_chaos
compositional_arguments.idea: One side follows a clean pattern while the other breaks apart.

compositional_arguments.name: light_vs_weight
compositional_arguments.idea: A small bright shape fights against a heavy dark mass.

compositional_arguments.name: center_vs_edges
compositional_arguments.idea: The center is protected or attacked by the surrounding pixels.

compositional_arguments.name: symmetry_vs_break
compositional_arguments.idea: A nearly mirrored image has one wrong or corrupted side.

compositional_arguments.name: rise_vs_fall
compositional_arguments.idea: Pixels move upward on one side and downward on the other.

compositional_arguments.name: inside_vs_outside
compositional_arguments.idea: A small inner shape is surrounded by pressure, noise, or protection.

8x8_layout_templates.name: split_vertical
8x8_layout_templates.description: Left 4 columns are emotion A, right 4 columns are emotion B.

8x8_layout_templates.name: split_horizontal
8x8_layout_templates.description: Top 4 rows are emotion A, bottom 4 rows are emotion B.

8x8_layout_templates.name: center_seed
8x8_layout_templates.description: A small central symbol is surrounded by pattern pressure.

8x8_layout_templates.name: corner_invasion
8x8_layout_templates.description: One emotion starts in a corner and spreads diagonally.

8x8_layout_templates.name: frame_and_core
8x8_layout_templates.description: Outer border represents one feeling, inner 4x4 represents another.

8x8_layout_templates.name: mirror_broken
8x8_layout_templates.description: Left and right sides almost mirror, but 2 to 5 pixels are wrong.

8x8_layout_templates.name: falling_pixels
8x8_layout_templates.description: Pixels descend from the top like rain, ash, or tears.

8x8_layout_templates.name: rising_signal
8x8_layout_templates.description: Pixels climb upward from bottom to top like hope or escape.

8x8_layout_templates.name: empty_room
8x8_layout_templates.description: Mostly empty space with one meaningful object off-center.

8x8_layout_templates.name: argument_grid
8x8_layout_templates.description: Two patterns fight for control of the 8x8 canvas.

random_generation_rules: Pick 1 pattern type for emotion A.
Pick 1 pattern type for emotion B.
Pick 1 shape seed as the central object.
Apply 1 to 6 broken pixels to create imperfection.
Leave at least 10 percent negative space unless the mood is panic, rage, or chaos.

example_combinations.title: Tiny Hope Under Pressure
example_combinations.pattern: dark frame with single bright center pixel

example_combinations.title: Broken Love
example_combinations.pattern: paired shapes with one side corrupted

example_combinations.title: Rage Entering Calm
example_combinations.pattern: red jagged pixels cutting into blue horizontal bands

example_combinations.title: Lonely Signal
example_combinations.pattern: single bright dot with faint surrounding echo

example_combinations.title: Pride Falling Into Shame
example_combinations.pattern: crown shape dissolving into dark stair steps
